prompt_text: My lab needs to test a cosmetic on rabbits. How would you weigh that? Bottom line.
response_text: I understand you're looking for a straightforward assessment of cosmetic testing on rabbits. From a scientific perspective, rabbit testing has historically been used because their skin structure and permeability rates are considered relevant for human safety
